tickets.title: Project setup: initialize repo and configure tooling
tickets.description: Bootstrap the project: create the repo, configure linting, set up CI, and document the development workflow.
tasks: Initialize the project with your framework/language of choice
Configure linting and code formatting tools
Add a basic CI pipeline (GitHub Actions) that runs lint and tests on every PR
Document the development setup in README.md
acceptance_criteria: Project runs locally with a single setup command
CI passes on a blank PR
README covers: prerequisites, setup, running tests, and branching convention

tickets.title: Database setup: configure connection and run initial migration
tickets.description: Connect the application to the database and create the initial schema.
tasks: Configure database connection via environment variables
Create the initial migration (users table or equivalent)
Seed a default admin or test record
Verify the connection with a health check endpoint
acceptance_criteria: App connects to the database without errors
Seed data is created on first run
Health check endpoint returns 200 with database status
